name: IRC_LC_REASONS_VL
query: SELECT IRC_LC_REASONS_B.REASON_ID REASON_ID, IRC_LC_REASONS_B.REASON_CODE REASON_CODE, IRC_LC_REASONS_B.REASON_STATUS_CODE REASON_STATUS_CODE, IRC_LC_REASONS_TL.REASON_NAME REASON_NAME, IRC_LC_REASONS_B.MODULE_ID MODULE_ID, IRC_LC_REASONS_B.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER, IRC_LC_REASONS_B.CREATED_BY CREATED_BY, IRC_LC_REASONS_B.CREATION_DATE CREATION_DATE, IRC_LC_REASONS_B.LAST_UPDATED_BY LAST_UPDATED_BY, IRC_LC_REASONS_B.LAST_UPDATE_DATE LAST_UPDATE_DATE, IRC_LC_REASONS_B.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, IRC_LC_REASONS_B.SEED_DATA_SOURCE SEED_DATA_SOURCE FROM IRC_LC_REASONS_B, IRC_LC_REASONS_TL WHERE IRC_LC_REASONS_B.REASON_ID = IRC_LC_REASONS_TL.REASON_ID AND IRC_LC_REASONS_TL.LANGUAGE = USERENV('LANG')
